description_long: This is a large, ornate sword featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip and a predominantly white and gold color scheme. The blade is bordered with gold trim and has a central white section, giving it a regal and ceremonial appearance. The crossguard is elaborate, with gold wings and a blue gem-like accent at the center, adding to its decorative quality. The handle is wrapped in a white material with gold accents and ends in a faceted pommel, also gold. The sword's overall design suggests a blend of functionality and display, suitable for ceremonial or high-status use. The craftsmanship and embellishments indicate it is not a standard utilitarian weapon but rather a prestigious or symbolic object.
description: A large, ornate sword with a straight, double-edged white blade, gold trim, and an elaborate gold crossguard with blue accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, gold trim, and the detailed crossguard with blue accent.
description_view_1: Edge-on view revealing the thinness of the blade and the layered construction of the handle and guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the blade's white and gold coloration and the ornate crossguard.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, highlighting the sword's slim profile and the symmetry of the handle and blade.
attribute_handle_design: straight, white-wrapped grip with gold accents and a faceted gold pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold trim, blue gem accent, decorative crossguard
